widgets_values: You can drag the audio from a video file instead. Use the "Trim Audio Duration" node to set your start and end point for the audio file.

Add your API key in the 'API Key' field above.
To generate an API Key for FREE, go to: https://console.ltx.video/

This API text encoding usage is completely FREE. Read more here:
https://ltx.io/model/model-blog/ltx-2-better-control-for-real-workflows

Using this saves you a lot of VRAM and speeds up inference time.
If you still prefer, you can use the regular ClipTextEncoder node for your positive and negative prompt, and you'll have to load the Gemma3 Loader Model node.

3D animation style, bright daytime countryside, Inside a red vintage car driving along a rural road, a green-skinned zombie woman with shoulder-length light green hair sits in the passenger seat, her torn beige shirt worn and frayed. A male zombie with short green hair and a ripped blue shirt drives, focused on the road. The camera holds a steady medium shot from the dashboard, with soft car vibration. The engine hums steadily. The woman gazes ahead and says in a calm, slightly tired voice, “They ought to make the day the time changes the first day of summer.” The driver keeps his eyes forward, puzzled, and responds flatly, “What?” A brief pause with only the engine sound.
blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles

inputs.prompt: 3D animation style, bright daytime countryside, Inside a red vintage car driving along a rural road, a green-skinned zombie woman with shoulder-length light green hair sits in the passenger seat, her torn beige shirt worn and frayed. A male zombie with short green hair and a ripped blue shirt drives, focused on the road. The camera holds a steady medium shot from the dashboard, with soft car vibration. The engine hums steadily.
